what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG outline user/profile icon with a circular head and a shoulder arc, using inherited stroke color and no fill.
observations: The graphic is drawn with fill="none" and stroke="currentColor".
Stroke styling uses width 1.5 with round caps and joins.
The head is a circle at cx="12", cy="9", r="3.5".
The body is a single arc path starting at x=5 y=20 and spanning 14 units horizontally.
standouts: The icon uses only two visible shape elements.
Filename suggests a user-circle icon, while the SVG content contains a user glyph without an outer circle.
conventions: Follows common outline icon conventions with a 24px viewBox, no fill, rounded strokes, and currentColor theming.
Keeps SVG markup compact and inline.
Uses geometric primitives rather than embedded paths for the head.
concerns: No title, role, or aria attributes are present in the standalone SVG.
The filename implies a surrounding circle, but the graphic itself does not include one.
notes: This file is a compact reusable outline user/profile SVG icon asset.
questions: Is the missing outer circle intentional for this icon name?
Is accessibility metadata expected to be added by the consuming component?
Should stroke width remain fixed at 1.5 across this icon set?
purpose_vs_actual: The apparent purpose from the filename matches a user/profile icon, though the content does not include a surrounding circle.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable user/account glyph that can adopt the surrounding text or UI color.
contribution: Contributes a scalable, color-inheriting user/profile outline glyph made from simple SVG primitives for use in an icon system.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 SVG user/profile outline icon using currentColor stroke, a circular head, and an arc-shaped shoulder path.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing a user, account, or profile action in a themeable icon asset set.
